hardRules: Historical paid-through-May is a documented claim until matched item by item to the sanitized financial source.
June Q1 requires item-level review because only some payments are pending.
June Q2 is pending until item-level financial confirmation.
A missing quincena is a conflict/review item and is not silently inferred.
Amounts missing in HR remain partial_pending_source and cannot enter a payment batch.
Source-safe pay actions are blocked and never create local paid movements.
